sourceStatus.detail: Latest non-missing observation loaded for each series.
Loaded 45 current exact-contract series from the CFTC Public Reporting Environment.

methodology.rates: Latest non-missing public FRED observations. Basis-point changes compare with the previous available observation.
methodology.cot: CFTC Public Reporting Environment futures-only data. Commodities use Managed Money; financial futures use Leveraged Funds. Every row must match an approved exact code, complete market/exchange identity and freshness limit; history includes the latest 52 weekly observations.
methodology.warning: COT reflects Tuesday positions normally released Friday. It is positioning context, not a real-time signal or proof of trader intent.
methodology.cotRegistry: Rows require an exact CFTC contract-market code and exact approved market/exchange name. Unapproved benchmarks remain unavailable; no open-interest ranking or similar-name substitution is used.

unavailable.label: WTI crude oil
unavailable.reason: The historical NYMEX Light Sweet Crude Oil identity stops in 2022 in the current Disaggregated Futures-Only dataset. Current rows are ICE WTI or NYMEX WTI Financial products and must not be substituted for the intended managed-money benchmark.

unavailable.label: Brent crude oil
unavailable.reason: No exact CFTC contract has been approved as the ICE Brent benchmark. NYMEX Brent Last Day must not be substituted.

unavailable.label: US Henry Hub natural gas
unavailable.reason: The historical standard NYMEX Natural Gas identity stops in 2022 in the current Disaggregated Futures-Only dataset. Current Henry Hub rows are financial, basis, index, penultimate or different contract-size products and must not be substituted for the intended managed-money benchmark.

unavailable.label: UK NBP natural gas
unavailable.reason: No exact CFTC contract has been approved as the UK NBP benchmark. Another gas contract must not be substituted.

unavailable.label: Oats
unavailable.reason: The exact OATS - CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE series (historical code 004603) has not published a current observation since 2 June 2026, so it is shown as unavailable rather than carrying stale positioning as current.
